---
title: "Herbert Coleridge"
---

## Herbert Coleridge

**Dates:** (1830-1861)

### Description

barrister and philologist

### Biography

The son of Henry Nelson Coleridge and Sara Coleridge, he married (spring 1853) Ellen Phillips and died of consumption. [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 10th 1861

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
